channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Aliro Official: Apple, Google and Samsung Unlock Next-Gen Digital Keys
item.description: The Connectivity Standards Alliance has officially launched Aliro 1.0, a new access control standard backed by Apple, Google and Samsung that aims to ...

item.title: The Hidden DNA Shape That Could Break Cancer
item.description: A fleeting DNA fold called i‑DNA can switch cancer‑related genes on and off, revealing a hidden structural weak point that future therapies might expl...

item.title: Indigenous Communities Report Dramatic Loss Of Large Bird Species Over 80 Years
item.description: As the global avian extinction crisis accelerates, the loss of large-bodied birds is destroying local biodiversity and ecology, and eroding the cultur...

item.title: 5 Ways To Fix The Classroom In The AI Age (That Actually Work
item.description: Sal Khan shares 5 urgent shifts schools must make for the AI age: master basics, confront cheating, teach writing, build agency, and strengthen human ...

item.title: Meta Quest 4 Core Design Revealed In Meta Firmware
item.description: Meta's next VR headset, if it comes out, may have a more light and lithe design than the current Meta Quest 3. But is this the Meta Quest 4 or a serie...

item.title: No.
item.description: Is a complete sentence. So is, “yes.”

item.title: Love your customers
item.description: It’s nice if you do, but it’s not required. You’re not them. You may have had different experiences, been exposed to different ideas or simply be prep...

item.title: Time is the wildcard
item.description: There are two feet of snow blocking your car from the road. This is a problem. Except it’s not a problem if you don’t need to leave the house for a fe...

item.title: Sarcasm self-defeats
item.description: Sarcasm is an easy way to amplify feedback. It has two hidden costs: If you have confidence in your standing and your idea, then sarcasm is simply get...

item.title: Blizzard pasttimes
item.description: Millions of folks are about to get snowed in. Stay safe. Here’s a code for last year’s Thriving with AI course on Udemy. It’s free for the first 1,000...
